env_vars_required.SIGNAL_API_URL: http://signal-api.railway.internal:8000  (Railway internal URL — set in n8n service)

notes: 1. Deploy signal-api service on Railway from this repo (Dockerfile)
2. Deploy n8n using image: n8nio/n8n:latest with volume at /home/node/.n8n
3. Set SIGNAL_API_URL to the Railway internal URL (not the public URL)
4. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID on the n8n service
5. Import this workflow file into n8n via Settings → Import
6. Add Telegram Bot credentials in n8n Credentials
7. Activate the workflow — it fires every hour on bar close
8. Active pairs: EUR/USD, USD/JPY, AUD/JPY, USD/CAD (all 4 from signal engine)
9. Duplicate signals are filtered by the API — each setup alerts exactly once
10. Node 7 logs every no-signal hour to Google Sheets for full audit trail
11. Node 9-11 alert on yfinance data feed failures via Telegram
